title: Décor Snap n Seal 600ml Stainless Steel Water Bottle with Straw, BPA Free - Leakproof Metal Flask with Carry Handle for School, Travel, Work & Gym - Ideal Drinking Bottle for Kids & Adults - Black
features: THE DECOR SNAP N SEAL LID - an innovative lid that locks the spout in place, allowing for quick, mess-free sips without removing the cap, ideal for staying hydrated and hygenic.
LEAKPROOF - With an airtight seal to prevent leaks, this bottle is perfect for kids to take to school or adults to take on the go.
STAY COOL ALL DAY – Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold for up to 24 hours, making it perfect for workouts, school, commuting, or hot days on the go.
SUPPORTS SUSTAINABLE LIFESTYLE - Made from high-quality, food-grade 304 stainless steel , this reusable 600ml water bottle helps reduce single-use plastic waste and supports eco-conscious habits.
VERSATILE USE - Whether it’s sports, outdoor adventures, travel work or the gym, this water bottle is designed to suit all lifestyles, keeping your drink cold wherever you go.
description: The Décor Snap n Seal Double Walled Stainless Steel 600ml Bottle is made from premium food grade 304 stainless steel and features an innovative Snap n Seal lid that locks spout into place and creates a leak proof seal.
